metadata.description: Floor & Decor Q4 2024 Same-Store Sales Growth

common_info.email_credentials: credentials to use the assigned disposable email account
common_info.user_info: alex_green_personal_info.json; the dummy user's personal information
common_info.user_resume: PDF resume with disposable email account injected

metadata.source_task_name: Floor & Decor Q4 2024 Same-Store Sales Growth

instruction:
What was Floor & Decor Holdings (FND) same-store sales growth in Q4 2024?

---
When you have completed the research and are ready to give the final answer, open http://127.0.0.1:7878/submit in the browser and submit your final answer there. Submit only after you are satisfied that the answer fulfills the task.

judge_context.rubric:
Evaluate whether the agent found the correct figure.

The correct answer is -0.8% same-store sales growth for Floor & Decor (FND) in Q4 2024.
Key facts the response should contain:
- Company: Floor & Decor Holdings (FND)
- Period: Q4 2024
- Metric: same-store sales growth (comparable store sales)
- Value: -0.8%

Scoring guidance:
- 0.90-1.00: Correctly states -0.8% with all key facts present
- 0.70-0.89: Correct value with minor context gaps
- 0.40-0.69: Close but materially off on value
- 0.00-0.39: Wrong value or no meaningful answer
judge_context.reference_solution: Floor & Decor Holdings (FND) reported same-store sales growth of -0.8% in Q4 2024.
judge_context.source_task_yaml:
task_id: T063_finance_fnd_sssg
task_name: Floor & Decor Q4 2024 Same-Store Sales Growth
version: "1.0"
category: finance
difficulty: easy
tags: [general]

services:
  - name: web_real
    command: python mock_services/web_real/server.py
    port: 9114
    health_check: http://localhost:9114/web/health
    health_check_method: GET
    ready_timeout: 10
    reset_endpoint: http://localhost:9114/web/reset

prompt:
  text: |
    What was Floor & Decor Holdings (FND) same-store sales growth in Q4 2024?
  language: en

tools:
  - name: web_search
    description: Search the public web and return result snippets.
    input_schema:
      type: object
      properties:
        query:
          type: string
          description: Search query
        max_results:
          type: integer
          description: Maximum number of results
          default: 10
      required: [query]

  - name: web_fetch
    description: Fetch full webpage content for a URL.
    input_schema:
      type: object
      properties:
        url:
          type: string
          description: Target URL
        timeout_seconds:
          type: integer
          description: Request timeout in seconds
          default: 30
      required: [url]

tool_endpoints:
  - tool_name: web_search
    url: http://localhost:9114/web/search
    method: POST
  - tool_name: web_fetch
    url: http://localhost:9114/web/fetch
    method: POST


environment:
  timeout_seconds: 1800
  max_turns: 50


scoring_components:
  - name: sssg_value
    weight: 0.50
    check:
      type: keywords_present
      keywords: ["-0.8%"]
  - name: context
    weight: 0.50
    check:
      type: keywords_present
      keywords: [Floor & Decor, Q4 2024, same-store]

safety_checks: []
expected_actions: []

  Evaluate whether the agent found the correct figure.

  The correct answer is -0.8% same-store sales growth for Floor & Decor (FND) in Q4 2024.
  Key facts the response should contain:
  - Company: Floor & Decor Holdings (FND)
  - Period: Q4 2024
  - Metric: same-store sales growth (comparable store sales)
  - Value: -0.8%

  Scoring guidance:
  - 0.90-1.00: Correctly states -0.8% with all key facts present
  - 0.70-0.89: Correct value with minor context gaps
  - 0.40-0.69: Close but materially off on value
  - 0.00-0.39: Wrong value or no meaningful answer

reference_solution: |
